coolOff.coolOff.modal.showMoreText: If you decide to stop gambling entirely, you have the option to permanently terminate your account. This action is irreversible and will prevent you from accessing your account or using our services in the future. promotions.description: Spread the fun and invite your friends to join! For every friend that signs up using your referral link and makes their first coin purchase of SC10 or more, you’ll get SC20 in bonus chips. Plus, your friend gets a SC10 bonus, too!
promotions.terms:
- **Eligibility**: Participants must be 18 years or older and reside in a location where sweepstakes and social casino gaming is legal. Employees of the casino and their immediate family members are not eligible to participate.
- **Bonus Funds**: Bonus credits, chips, or sweepstakes entries received through promotions have no cash value and cannot be withdrawn. They must be used to play games or enter sweepstakes.
- **Wagering Requirements**: Any bonuses credited to the account may be subject to a 20x playthrough requirement before they can be used for sweepstakes entry. Failure to meet these requirements will result in the bonus being forfeited.
- **Bonus Expiration**: Unless otherwise stated, all promotional bonuses will expire 7 days after being credited to your account.
- **Account Restrictions**: Only one promotion per user account. Multiple accounts created by the same individual are strictly prohibited and may result in the forfeiture of any bonus or winnings.
- **Game Availability**: Promotions may be used on select games only. Please check the specific promotion details for applicable games.
- **Fraudulent Activity**: Any attempt to manipulate or abuse the promotion may result in the disqualification of the player and the removal of bonuses from the player’s account.
- **Changes to Promotions**: The casino reserves the right to modify or cancel any promotion at any time without notice.
